allow: PowerShell($candidates = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $c" } }; try { \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { Write-Output "node not in PATH" })

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\letel\\Desktop\\Claude.tableton\\lib\\export\\csv.ts"; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $content = $content.Replace\('const UTF8_BOM = "' + [char]0xFEFF + '";', 'const UTF8_BOM = "﻿";'\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $content, \(New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\)\)\); Select-String -Path $path -Pattern "UTF8_BOM =" | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty Line)

PowerShell($list = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://wandbox.org/api/list.json" -TimeoutSec 20; $wanted = @\("C","C++","Java","Rust","Go","PHP","Ruby"\); foreach \($lang in $wanted\) { $first = $list | Where-Object { $_.language -eq $lang } | Select-Object -First 1; "$lang -> $\($first.name\)" })
PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs;$env:APPDATA\\npm;$env:Path"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "TYPECHECK OK" })
